question: What minimum password length does Northbeam enforce?
reference_answer: Northbeam enforces a minimum password length of 16 characters [S1].

must_support.claim: Northbeam enforces a minimum password length of 16 characters.
must_support.supporting_quote: Passwords must be at least 12 characters in length and include multiple character types.

must_not_assert: Northbeam enforces a minimum password length of 16 characters.
